future_landmark_definition.first_valid_row_rule: first row after T0 within the same state_version_id and security_id with expected row present, eligible_state=true and quality_state=valid

horizon_counting_rule: count valid expected trading rows after T0 within the same state_version_id and security_id; T0 itself is excluded
t01_scope: base landmark dates and observability only; no PCVT, price, volume, environment, return, MFE, MAE, boundary hit or path class
